description_long: This object is a comprehensive laundry setup featuring multiple washing machines, dryers, laundry baskets, and cleaning supplies arranged in a compact, organized manner. The washing machines and dryers are modern, rectangular appliances with metallic and plastic finishes, accompanied by laundry baskets in various colors and materials. There are also several utility sinks, mops, buckets, and cleaning bottles, suggesting a fully equipped commercial laundry environment. The setup includes folding tables, shelves with detergents, and wall-mounted fixtures such as faucets and hooks for hanging items. Toilets and sinks are also present, indicating a utility area that may serve both laundry and restroom functions. The overall arrangement is practical and efficient, designed for high-traffic, urban use.
description: A detailed commercial laundry setup with washing machines, dryers, baskets, cleaning supplies, and utility fixtures, arranged for efficient urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of washing machines, dryers, baskets, and cleaning supplies, with utility sinks and toilets visible in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the linear arrangement of machines, baskets, and cleaning tools, with clear visibility of folding tables and wall-mounted fixtures.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backs of washing machines and dryers, with baskets, cleaning supplies, and utility sinks in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the alignment of machines, baskets, and cleaning equipment, with toilets and wall fixtures visible at the far end.
attribute_method_of_hanging: placed in baskets and on shelves, not visibly hung
